economic_notes: Skatin Nations holds 100% interest in Skatin Nations Treaty Resource Inc. (consolidated using modified equity method). Also holds interests in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, BC FN GRS GP Ltd., and 1020376 B.C. Ltd. (33.3%). Limited partnership interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership not recorded (basis for qualified opinion). Logging income of $256,927 reported. ISC funding represents 47% of total revenue (down from 55% in 2023).
notes: Audit is qualified due to unrecorded limited partnership interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership — auditors could not obtain sufficient evidence on carrying amount. Cash and cash equivalents is negative ($-42,054) indicating a bank overdraft at year end. Long-term debt includes both BMO variable rate demand loans ($6,219,830) and CMHC mortgages ($187,468) totalling $6,407,298. Transfer from deferred revenue of $442,493 contributed to annual surplus. Member distributions of $364,923 recorded as an expense in 2024 (nil in 2023). Significant related party transactions with Tyhee Financial Services Ltd. ($465,093 combined) and Rex Grant & Company ($50,400). No schedule of remuneration for chief, council, or senior staff provided.
